summary: Iteration 184: Tested all 8 specified features/bugs: email format validation (frontend + backend), maxLength on fields, line2 optional placeholder, schema reload on dialog open. ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 8/8 pass. Frontend: 6/6 pass.
critical_code_review_comments: All email format validation code is implemented correctly in both frontend and backend.
FIELD_MAX map in CustomerSignupFields.tsx correctly limits email/company/phone/job_title to 50 and full_name to 100.
Line 2 placeholder correctly shows '(optional)' when line2.required=false in compact mode.
signupSchema reloads on every Create Customer dialog open (showCreateDialog dependency in useEffect at line 121-127 of CustomersTab.tsx) — confirmed working.
Backend regex /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]{2,}$/ correctly rejects 'a@gmai' (no dot in domain), 'user@nodomain', 'user@test.c'.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. The test for valid admin create customer email may have created a user 'Test Valid Admin Create' - can be cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All email format validation, maxLength, and line2 optional placeholder features are confirmed working. Backend email check is at auth.py:897-898 (register) and admin/customers.py:361-363 (admin_create_customer). Frontend validation is in Signup.tsx:validateSignupForm and CustomersTab.tsx:handleCreateCustomer. FIELD_MAX map in CustomerSignupFields.tsx handles HTML maxLength attributes. The 'automate-accounts' partner_code is reserved for platform admin only - customer registration via POST /api/auth/register with partner_code='automate-accounts' returns 403 (expected). Public /signup requires localStorage 'aa_partner_code' to be set.
rca_of_issue: N/A - all features working as implemented
